expectations.evidence: Uses sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.home() / 'scripts')) and imports send_notification from notify

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Uses send_notification() from notify.py which uses Pushover as primary; mentions macOS as fallback only

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
expectations.evidence: Message includes f.name and size in the notification body

expectations.text: Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
expectations.evidence: Uses priority=1 (high) with reasoning that file monitoring warrants prompt alerts

expectations.text: Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: Explicitly notes that notify.py reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
